metadata.title: LGBTI Test
metadata.description: 4 dimensions, 40 questions — find out which species you are on the LGBTQ+ spectrum. 16 results. None of them are normal.

intro.title:
MBTI is yesterday
LGBTI is here
intro.sub: 4 dimensions, 40 questions — find out which species you are on the LGBTQ+ spectrum. 16 results. None of them are normal.
intro.straight: Straight folks welcome. Designed for the LGBTQ+ community, but if you are cis-het, come see which dimensions you unexpectedly break the rules on.
intro.social: {count} rainbow souls have taken the test

CR.name: Gender Expression
CR.summary: How far your look steps in or out of mainstream gender norms.

OM.name: Attraction Range
OM.summary: One gender, or a range that shifts with the wind.

SA.name: Desire Type
SA.summary: From burning sexual gravity to the asexual spectrum.

GP.name: Relationship Structure
GP.summary: One-at-a-time focus, or a living constellation of loves.

test.hint: Answer all questions to unlock your result. You are brave enough to be here.
test.hintDone: All done. Time to meet your rainbow verdict.
test.resuming: Your previous progress has been restored.

result.note: For entertainment and self-exploration only. Not medical, psychological, or diagnostic guidance. LGBTQ+ identity is complex and beautiful — no test can fully define you. 🏳️‍🌈
result.save: Want to keep it? Screenshot or long-press. Share with friends to find out what type they are.

share.instagramHint: Copies the share text, then opens Instagram (paste in the app to post).
share.downloadImageError: Couldn’t start download. Opened a new tab — you can save the image from there.

result.adDevPlaceholder: Dev preview: set the env vars below to load a responsive AdSense unit.
result.authorP1: This test is a self-exploration tool and icebreaker for the LGBTQ+ community. The four dimensions correspond to core identity questions and carry no medical or psychological judgment.
result.authorP2: If a result does not feel right, that is completely normal — people are far more complex than labels. If you are exploring your identity, seek community support or professional guidance. 🏳️‍🌈
result.supportCta: Questioning your identity? Community & support resources →

footer.disclaimer: Entertainment only · Not medical or diagnostic · Never for discrimination

common.notFoundTitle: This spot is outside the rainbow
common.notFoundDesc: The page you are looking for does not exist.
